observations.note: Subject presents another variation of fear building exits inside places that are already safe. The pattern is not tactical failure. It is the cost of remaining psychologically available in a world that rewards emotional shutdown.
observations.aside: Lance note: I keep trying to separate wound from witness. The surface has made that difficult.
observations: quiet finding
No tremor noted. No visible injury. Emotional response remains the loudest symptom in the room.
behavioral marker
Subject remembered a voice with more precision than the route out. Tactical memory is not always the memory that wins.
after extraction
Subject looked at the recovered supplies with the expression of someone waiting for them to accuse back.

observations.note: Subject presents another variation of mercy becoming a reflex before strategy can interrupt. The pattern is not tactical failure. It is the cost of remaining psychologically available in a world that rewards emotional shutdown.
observations.aside: Lance note: The body came back. The question is how much of the person had to stay behind to make room for it.
observations: after extraction
Subject looked at the recovered supplies with the expression of someone waiting for them to accuse back.
watch period
Subject smiled at a harmless remark, then withdrew from the smile as if it belonged to someone safer.
file note
If this is instability, it is the kind that keeps a person from becoming useful in all the worst ways.

observations.note: Subject remains emotionally intact despite repeated psychological abrasion. The surface has altered them, but has not successfully converted feeling into numbness.
observations.aside: Lance note: There is a kind of person the surface cannot fully take. I am not sentimental enough to call that hope. Not in the official file.
observations: quiet finding
Subject remembered a name. Not a route. Not a cache. A name. The archive should preserve that. So should I.
clinical contradiction
They are less efficient than a numb raider and somehow more trustworthy. The math is irritating. The evidence is consistent.
file note
If the brain of a raider can remain human, then humanity is not a flaw in the system. It is the signal we are trying to keep alive.
